skills.name: Spinning Knife
skills.description: Throw a dagger just like a boomerang to damage the enemy. After giving damage to the enemy, [Pocket Knife] drops nearby the target, or a random [Pocket Knife] at the ground is thrown to the enemy by chance.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor SkillFactor %
Skill Factor(Pocket Knife) CaptionRatio %
[Pocket Knife] Duration: 10 seconds (maintain up to 10)

skills.name: Replica
skills.description: Throws multiple [Pocket Knife] to the sky which drops in the nearby area. Enemy located where [Pocket Knife] falls receives damage.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor %
[Pocket Knife] Duration: 10 seconds (remains up to 10)

skills.name: Fatal Roulette
skills.description: Spins the body and throws the Dagger to the enemies nearby while pressing the key. [Pocket Knife] falls to the ground periodically by a certain chance.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % per 0.5 seconds
Targets: CaptionRatio
[Pocket Knife] Duration: 10 seconds (remains up to 10)

skills.name: Climax
skills.description: Throws the Dagger continuously to damage the enemy. If the [Pocket Knife] is on the ground, 2 [Pocket Knife] flies to the target and gives damage per every strike of Climax.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 5
Skill Factor (Pocket Knife): CaptionRatio %

skills.name: Trick or Treat
skills.description: Drop a 2~4 [Pocket Knife] around you with a gesture of pulling something out of your arms, applying [Trick] debuff to nearby enemies, or [Treat] buff to you.
skills.effect_text:
Activates [Trick] or [Treat] effect by chance of 50%
[Trick] debuff
* Ignores Defense against damage received by CaptionRatio %
* Duration: 20 seconds
[Treat] buff
* Final damage of Clown skill increases by CaptionRatio2 %
* Duration: 60 seconds
[Pocket Knife] Duration: 10 seconds (remains up to 10)

skills.name: Clown Walk
skills.description: Apply [Slow] debuff to nearby enemy characters by deluding with quick foot skills. (Applies [Immobility] debuff to the monsters.)

attributes.name: Spinning Knife: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.description: * Increases the skill factor by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: Fatal Roulette: Infinity
attributes.description: * When the target is accurately hit by the thrown Dagger, other enemies nearby 75 range also gets damaged

attributes.name: Climax: Bleeding
attributes.description: * Enemy affected by Climax gets Bleeding

attributes.name: Clown Walk: Cheat Box
attributes.description:
* Summon box periodically while using Clown Walk

* Box is created every 0.5 seconds, damaging the nearby enemy when Clown Walk is finished or when the box is removed.

* Attack Skill Factor is reflected as [Pocket Knife] factor (considered as channeling)

* Number of targets : 4 per box (3 during PvP)

attributes.name: [Arts] Spinning Knife: Juggling
attributes.description:
* Final damage of the Spinning Knife decreases by 50%, but gives damage to nearby enemies 3 times every 10 seconds

* The requirements for this skill to be activated are as follows

- SP required to use Spinning Knife 3 times

- Enemy is within nearby 150 distance

- Does not activate unless in combat situation before the activation

- Does not activate during [Cloaking]

- Does not activate during cut scene

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: [Arts] Replica: Trickery
attributes.description: * Throw the [Pocket Knife] to the location of the enemy and instantly move forward
